items.title: Cost of Amorim sacking revealed as Man Utd finances announced
items.summary: Man Utd's latest financial results show the club are on a positive track, despite having to pay out £16.7m to sacked Ruben Amorim and his coaching staff.

items.title: Man Utd close to agreeing deal for Atalanta's Ederson
items.summary: Manchester United are close to agreeing a deal with Atalanta for Ederson.

items.title: Man City prioritise Anderson as Chelsea put £100m price tag on Enzo
items.summary: Manchester City will prioritise signing Elliot Anderson this summer and have no intention of pursuing a move for Chelsea's Enzo Fernandez, with the Blues putting a £100m price tag on the midfielder.

items.title: Barcelona join race to sign Gordon as talks begin
items.summary: Barcelona have joined the race to sign Newcastle winger Anthony Gordon.

items.title: Barcelona in talks with Newcastle to sign Gordon
items.summary: Barcelona join Bayern Munich in the race to sign Newcastle United forward Anthony Gordon.

items.title: 'Not here to put on a fashion show' - Osaka opponent hits out at viral outfit
items.summary: Naomi Osaka's outfit in her first-round French Open match has drawn plenty of attention - but left her opponent unimpressed.

items.title: Yapp named head coach of first-ever British & Irish Lions women's team
items.summary: Jo Yapp has been appointed head coach of the first-ever British & Irish Lions women's team.

items.title: Devlin & Gordon not on list of Hearts departures
items.summary: Hearts confirm the departures of Beni Baningime and Frankie Kent, but Cammy Devlin and Craig Gordon are not included in the list of out-of-contract players leaving Tynecastle.

items.title: The World Cup of kits: who are the winners for 2026?
items.summary: The World Cup is two weeks away, but the chatter around kits has been going for a while. From riffs on much-loved favourites to new entries with the potential to become future classics, here are the 10 fashion picks to become familiar with before the tournament Continue reading...
